ExportQuery:
select uniquePersonKey,
beneficiaryID,
medicaidID,
named_struct('first',FirstName,'last',LastName,'middle',MiddleInitial) as name,
date_format(dateOfBirth, 'MM/dd/yyyy') as dateOfBirth,
ifnull(gender,'U')  as gender,
named_struct('line1', PermanentAddressLine1, "line2", PermanentAddressLine2, 'city',PermanentCity, 'state', PermanentState, 'zipCode',  PermanentZipCode, 'county', PermanentCounty) as  permanent,
PhoneNumber as telephone,
email,
fax,
named_struct('line1', MailingAddressLine1, "line2", MailingAddressLine2, 'city',MailingCity, 'state', MailingState, 'zipCode',  MailingZipCode, 'county', MailingCounty) as mailing,
named_struct('first',POAFirstName,'last',POALastName,'middle',POAMiddleInitial) as caretaker,
'9' as race, 
'28' as raceDataSource, 
'19' as ethnicity,
'98' as ethnicityDataSource, 
'39' as spokeLanguage,
'41' as spokeLanguageSource,
ifnull(WrittenLanguageCode, '59') as writtenLanguage, 
ifnull(WrittenLanguageSourceCode, '61') as writtenLanguageSource, 
ifnull(otherLanguage, '79') as otherLanguage,
ifnull(OtherLanguageSourceCode, '81') as otherLanguageSource, 
ifnull(usCitizen, 'M') as usCitizen,
date_format(deceasedDate, 'MM/dd/yyyy') as deceasedDate,
maskedMemberId,
enrolleeEducation,
enrolleeEmployment,
array(AlternateKey1,AlternateKey2,AlternateKey3,AlternateKey4,AlternateKey5,AlternateKey6,AlternateKey7,AlternateKey8,AlternateKey9,AlternateKey10) as  alternateKey
from QueryResult
where FileLayoutDescription = 'CHCMember'
 AND ifnull(PlanMemberID,'')<>''
and ifnull(FirstName,'')<>''
and ifnull(Gender,'')<>''
and ifnull(LastName,'')<>''
and ifnull(PermanentAddressLine1,'')<>''
and ifnull(PermanentCity,'')<>''
and ifnull(DateOfBirth,'')<>''
and ifnull(PermanentState,'')<>''
and ifnull(PermanentZipCode,'')<>''
